tool_result_summary: 7 tables + 2 materialized views. Main data: mesonet_measurements (66GB), historical_station_values (56MB), two MVs.

tool_args: SELECT product, year, COUNT(*), COUNT(DISTINCT station_id), MIN/MAX timestamp FROM mesonet_measurements GROUP BY year
tool_result_summary: 5 years (2022-2026), 961M rows total. Stations grew 19→78. ~15 min query on 66GB table.

tool_args: Same breakdown for historical_station_values, mv_daily_station_summary, mv_monthly_station_summary
tool_result_summary: Historical: 37 years (1990-2026), 228k rows, stations peaked at 564 then declined to 270. MVs mirror mesonet period.

tool_args: Identify missing data products from HCDP API spec
tool_result_summary: Gridded rasters (GeoTIFF), daily historical values, and SPI drought index not ingested. Only monthly historical and mesonet 5-min loaded.
